data.description:
# S4 — CI service account + credentials (SSM-backed)

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions).

## Why
The CI vote-back SSHes into Gerrit as a service account (the g2p production pattern); g2p also
needs a GitHub PAT to `workflow_dispatch`. Both credentials must follow the infra's no-plaintext
invariant: SSM SecureString + materialize-at-boot (as with the bot token, deploy key, OAuth secret).

## What
Provision the CI Gerrit service account (with the `Verified` ACL), and wire the PAT + SSH key
through SSM and the boot-time fetch, plus the GitHub-side vars/secret. Record the inbound
GitHub→Gerrit SSH trust path as an ADR.

## Scope
- `infra/gerrit/service-user.sh` (provision the account, as a template), `infra/terraform/ssm.tf`
  (new SecureString slots), `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh` (host-side materialization).
- GitHub repo vars/secret; new ADR for the inbound SSH trust path. Pairs with S3.
- Out of scope: the workflow (S5), the gate (S1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Provision the CI Gerrit service account via `infra/gerrit/service-user.sh` (account + group +
      the `Verified -1..+1` ACL from S1).
- [ ] Add the g2p PAT — **fine-grained, single-repo (`navapbc/rebar`)**, Actions read/write +
      Contents/Metadata read (NOT a classic org-wide PAT) — and the service-account SSH key to
      `infra/terraform/ssm.tf` (`rebar_secret_params`, `ignore_changes=value`), and extend
      `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh` with a host-side materialization path (it currently writes
      only the container `.env`).
- [ ] Set GitHub repo vars `GERRIT_SERVER` / `GERRIT_SSH_USER` / `GERRIT_KNOWN_HOSTS` /
      `GERRIT_URL` and secret `GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY`.
- [ ] Define a rotation + retire path for both the PAT and `GERRIT_SSH_PRIVKEY` (compromise
      response + PoC decommission).
- [ ] Write an ADR recording the inbound GitHub→Gerrit SSH vote path (blast radius, key scope).
data.title: S4 — CI service account + credentials (SSM-backed)
